# Next.js Project Init + Dependencies + shadcn/ui Setup

## Objective

Initialize a Next.js 14 application in the `/ui` directory at the workspace root (`c:\dev\orchestration\v3\ui`) using the App Router with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS, install all project npm dependencies, and configure shadcn/ui with 12 base components.

## Context

This is the foundation task for the MONITORING-UI project — a read-only Next.js dashboard that visualizes orchestration pipeline state. The `/ui` directory does not yet exist and must be created from scratch. All subsequent tasks (types, utilities, API routes, layout) depend on this task completing successfully. The project uses Tailwind CSS v4 with the `class` dark mode strategy, and shadcn/ui provides the base component library.

## File Targets

| Action | Path | Notes |
|--------|------|-------|
| CREATE | `ui/package.json` | Generated by `create-next-app`, then extended with additional deps |
| CREATE | `ui/tsconfig.json` | Generated by `create-next-app`; verify `@/*` path alias maps to `./*` |
| CREATE | `ui/next.config.ts` | Generated by `create-next-app` |
| CREATE | `ui/tailwind.config.ts` | Generated by `create-next-app`; add `darkMode: 'class'` |
| CREATE | `ui/postcss.config.mjs` | Generated by `create-next-app` |
| CREATE | `ui/components.json` | Generated by `npx shadcn@latest init`; configured for Tailwind CSS v4 |
| CREATE | `ui/.env.local` | Contains `WORKSPACE_ROOT` env var |
| CREATE | `ui/.gitignore` | Generated by `create-next-app` |
| CREATE | `ui/app/layout.tsx` | Generated by `create-next-app` (placeholder — will be replaced in T6) |
| CREATE | `ui/app/page.tsx` | Generated by `create-next-app` (placeholder — will be replaced in T6) |
| CREATE | `ui/app/globals.css` | Generated by `create-next-app` (placeholder — will be replaced in T6) |
| CREATE | `ui/components/ui/badge.tsx` | shadcn component |
| CREATE | `ui/components/ui/card.tsx` | shadcn component |
| CREATE | `ui/components/ui/sheet.tsx` | shadcn component |
| CREATE | `ui/components/ui/scroll-area.tsx` | shadcn component |
| CREATE | `ui/components/ui/sidebar.tsx` | shadcn component |
| CREATE | `ui/components/ui/accordion.tsx` | shadcn component |
| CREATE | `ui/components/ui/input.tsx` | shadcn component |
| CREATE | `ui/components/ui/tooltip.tsx` | shadcn component |
| CREATE | `ui/components/ui/skeleton.tsx` | shadcn component |
| CREATE | `ui/components/ui/toggle-group.tsx` | shadcn component |
| CREATE | `ui/components/ui/separator.tsx` | shadcn component |
| CREATE | `ui/components/ui/alert.tsx` | shadcn component |

## Implementation Steps

1. **Scaffold the Next.js project.** From the workspace root (`c:\dev\orchestration\v3`), run:
   ```powershell
   npx create-next-app@14 ui --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app --no-src-dir --import-alias "@/*" --use-npm
   ```
   Accept all defaults. This creates the `/ui` directory with App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and ESLint pre-configured.

2. **Install production dependencies.** From the `ui/` directory, run:
   ```powershell
   cd ui
   npm install chokidar@^3 gray-matter@^4 react-markdown@^9 remark-gfm@^4 rehype-sanitize@^6 yaml@^2 lucide-react@^0.300 class-variance-authority@^0.7 clsx@^2 tailwind-merge@^2 @tailwindcss/typography@^0.5
   ```

3. **Verify dev dependencies.** The following should already be installed by `create-next-app`. Confirm they exist in `package.json` under `devDependencies`:
   - `@types/node` (^20)
   - `@types/react` (^18)
   - `@types/react-dom` (^18)
   - `eslint` (^8)
   - `eslint-config-next` (^14)
   
   If any are missing, install them:
   ```powershell
   npm install --save-dev @types/node@^20 @types/react@^18 @types/react-dom@^18 eslint@^8 eslint-config-next@^14
   ```

4. **Configure `tailwind.config.ts`** to add the `darkMode: 'class'` strategy. Open `ui/tailwind.config.ts` and ensure it contains:
   ```typescript
   import type { Config } from "tailwindcss";

   const config: Config = {
     darkMode: "class",
     content: [
       "./app/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx,mdx}",
       "./components/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx,mdx}",
     ],
     theme: {
       extend: {},
     },
     plugins: [],
   };
   export default config;
   ```

5. **Verify `tsconfig.json` path aliases.** Ensure the `paths` section maps `@/*` to `./*`:
   ```json
   {
     "compilerOptions": {
       "paths": {
         "@/*": ["./*"]
       }
     }
   }
   ```
   This alias is used by all subsequent tasks to import types via `@/types/*`, utilities via `@/lib/*`, etc.

6. **Initialize shadcn/ui.** From the `ui/` directory, run:
   ```powershell
   npx shadcn@latest init
   ```
   When prompted, select these options:
   - Style: **New York**
   - Base color: **Slate**
   - CSS variables: **Yes**
   
   This creates `components.json` and configures shadcn/ui. After init, verify `components.json` exists and contains correct path aliases (`@/components`, `@/lib/utils`).

7. **Create `ui/lib/utils.ts`** if not already created by shadcn init. It must export the `cn()` utility:
   ```typescript
   import { type ClassValue, clsx } from "clsx";
   import { twMerge } from "tailwind-merge";

   export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {
     return twMerge(clsx(inputs));
   }
   ```

8. **Install all 12 shadcn/ui components.** From the `ui/` directory, run each command (use `--yes` flag to skip prompts):
   ```powershell
   npx shadcn@latest add badge --yes
   npx shadcn@latest add card --yes
   npx shadcn@latest add sheet --yes
   npx shadcn@latest add scroll-area --yes
   npx shadcn@latest add sidebar --yes
   npx shadcn@latest add accordion --yes
   npx shadcn@latest add input --yes
   npx shadcn@latest add tooltip --yes
   npx shadcn@latest add skeleton --yes
   npx shadcn@latest add toggle-group --yes
   npx shadcn@latest add separator --yes
   npx shadcn@latest add alert --yes
   ```
   Each command copies the component source into `ui/components/ui/`.

9. **Create `ui/.env.local`** with the workspace root environment variable:
   ```
   WORKSPACE_ROOT=c:\dev\orchestration\v3
   ```
   This variable is read by the path resolver module (built in a later task) to locate project files.

10. **Verify the setup.** Run these commands from the `ui/` directory:
    ```powershell
    npm install          # Ensure all dependencies resolve
    npx tsc --noEmit     # TypeScript compilation check (no output files)
    npm run build        # Full Next.js production build
    ```
    All three commands must complete with zero errors.

## Contracts & Interfaces

This task does not implement any application interfaces — it scaffolds the project that subsequent tasks build upon. The only contract is the `cn()` utility function:

```typescript
// ui/lib/utils.ts
import { type ClassValue, clsx } from "clsx";
import { twMerge } from "tailwind-merge";

export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]): string {
  return twMerge(clsx(inputs));
}
```

This function is consumed by every shadcn/ui component and all custom components in subsequent tasks.

## Styles & Design Tokens

This task installs the CSS infrastructure only. The full design tokens are applied in T6 (Root Layout + Global Styles). For this task, only verify:

- `darkMode: "class"` is set in `tailwind.config.ts` — this enables the Tailwind `dark:` variant for all subsequent styling
- `globals.css` contains Tailwind directives (generated by `create-next-app`):
  ```css
  @tailwind base;
  @tailwind components;
  @tailwind utilities;
  ```
- shadcn/ui CSS variables are present in `globals.css` (added by `shadcn init`) — these provide the base `--background`, `--foreground`, `--card`, `--muted`, `--accent`, `--border`, `--destructive` tokens that the design system extends

## Test Requirements

- [ ] `cd ui && npm install` exits with code 0 (no missing peer dependencies, no errors)
- [ ] `cd ui && npx tsc --noEmit` exits with code 0 (zero TypeScript compilation errors)
- [ ] `cd ui && npm run build` exits with code 0 (Next.js production build succeeds)
- [ ] All 12 shadcn/ui component files exist in `ui/components/ui/`:
  - `badge.tsx`, `card.tsx`, `sheet.tsx`, `scroll-area.tsx`, `sidebar.tsx`, `accordion.tsx`, `input.tsx`, `tooltip.tsx`, `skeleton.tsx`, `toggle-group.tsx`, `separator.tsx`, `alert.tsx`
- [ ] `ui/lib/utils.ts` exists and exports the `cn()` function
- [ ] `ui/.env.local` exists and contains `WORKSPACE_ROOT=c:\dev\orchestration\v3`
- [ ] `ui/components.json` exists and is valid JSON with shadcn/ui configuration
- [ ] `ui/tsconfig.json` contains `"@/*": ["./*"]` path alias

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `cd ui && npm install` completes without errors
- [ ] `cd ui && npx tsc --noEmit` passes (no type errors in scaffolded project)
- [ ] `components.json` is configured with correct paths and shadcn/ui settings
- [ ] All 12 shadcn/ui components exist in `ui/components/ui/`
- [ ] `.env.local` contains `WORKSPACE_ROOT` pointing to workspace root
- [ ] `tailwind.config.ts` has `darkMode: 'class'` strategy
- [ ] `tsconfig.json` has `@/*` path alias mapping to `./*`
- [ ] `lib/utils.ts` exists and exports `cn()` utility
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds with zero errors
- [ ] No lint errors from `npm run lint`

## Constraints

- Do NOT create any application code (types, utilities, API routes, layout components) — those are separate tasks (T2–T6)
- Do NOT modify or delete any existing files outside the `ui/` directory — the orchestration system files at the workspace root must remain untouched
- Do NOT use `yarn` or `pnpm` — use `npm` exclusively as the package manager
- Do NOT use a `src/` directory — use `app/` directly at the project root
- Do NOT install dependencies beyond those listed in this document
- Do NOT customize the generated `layout.tsx`, `page.tsx`, or `globals.css` beyond verifying they work — T6 replaces them entirely
- Ensure `.env.local` is NOT committed to git (it should be in `.gitignore` by default from `create-next-app`)
